data.title: Nasdaq Snaps 13-Session Win Streak On Hormuz Tensions: Investor Sentiment Improves Further, Fear Index In 'Greed' Zone
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index continued to show improvement in market sentiment, holding in the "Greed" zone. On Monday, U.S. stocks saw mixed results, with the Nasdaq Composite ending a 13-session winning streak due to renewed U.S.-Iran tensions. Over the weekend, the U.S. Navy seized the Iranian cargo ship TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman. President Donald Trump indicated it's unlikely he will extend the ceasefire with Iran, set to end soon. Despite this, there were significant gains last week, with the Dow rising by 3.2% and the S&P 500 surging by 4.5%. Cleveland-Cliffs Inc. (NYSE: CLF) saw its shares drop by over 2% on Monday following earnings report.

data.title: Northrop Grumman Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Northrop Grumman Corporation is set to unveil its Q1 earnings on April 21, with analysts predicting a significant increase from last year. The expected earnings per share are $6.06, compared to the previous year's $3.32. Revenue estimates for the quarter stand at $9.76 billion, up from $9.47 billion in the same period last year. The company recently secured a contract modification from the U.S. Navy for nine additional surface electronic warfare improvement program Block 3 systems. Following this news, Northrop Grumman's stock price dropped by 1.2% to close at $656.98 on Monday. For more details and analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.
Barclays downgrades Deutsche Bank to Equal Weight from Overweight.

data.title: Fruition Achieves monday.com Advanced Delivery Partner Badge with monday Service and CRM Specialist Partner Recognition
data.description: Sydney-based company Fruition, a certified Platinum Partner of monday.com, has recently achieved the coveted Advanced Delivery Partner Badge. This recognition is accompanied by their appointment as Specialist Partners for both monday CRM and monday Service. Attaining the official monday ADP Status is a prestigious accomplishment, granted only to a select few distinguished consulting firms known for their exceptional performance. These partners are required to provide customized training for implementations, automations, and integrations. This milestone solidifies Fruition's position as a leading player in the field, joining an exclusive group of partners with proven expertise in monday.com solutions.

data.title: A gradual start to FY 2026, with fundamentals moving in the right direction. Full-year targets confirmed with organic growth range narrowed.
data.description: The fiscal year 2026 began at a slow pace, showing positive movement in key areas. Full-year objectives remain on track, with the range for organic growth being adjusted.

data.title: TRX under pressure, taker buy/sell ratio 0.64 signals aggressive selling. RSI near 70, likely test of $0.30 support in 10 days.
data.description: The current buy/sell ratio for TRON stands at 0.64, indicating a significant level of aggressive selling. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is nearing 70, suggesting a possible upcoming test of the $0.30 support level in the next 10 days. This movement is expected as institutional traders are reducing their positions in the market.

data.title: LTC set to hit $58-60 in 14 days, as neutral RSI at 51 & 68% long positions signal imminent surge.
data.description: With Litecoin currently seeing a neutral RSI at 51 and zero MACD divergence, there are indications of a potential significant upward movement. Smart money is heavily positioned at 68% long, hinting at a likely breakthrough in the range of $58 to $60 in the upcoming two weeks.

data.title: ATOM price to hover around $1.65 before possible breakout. Investors wait for 15-20% move in 10 days.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cosmos is currently in a distribution phase as large investors, known as whales, are taking long positions while smaller retail investors are being pushed out of the market. Despite appearing technically neutral, there is a significant accumulation of pressure indicating a potential price movement of 15-20% in the next 10 days.

data.title: NY Assemblyman Bores suggests AI dividend tax to aid Americans hit by automation, by taxing AI firms for direct payments.
data.description: Assemblyman Alex Bores of New York has introduced a proposal to impose taxes on artificial intelligence (AI) corporations with the aim of providing dividends to American citizens who are experiencing job loss due to automation. Under the plan, AI companies would be subject to a specified tax rate, and the revenue generated would be distributed among impacted individuals. This initiative is designed to assist US citizens who are facing displacement from employment as a result of technological advancements.

data.title: BCH price could hit $465 in 10 days despite whales going long. Smart money goes long as retail sells. Chance of breakout above $451 resistance at 65%.
data.description: Bitcoin Cash is currently trading at $442, with significant activity from smart investors going long while retail traders are selling off their positions. The current technical analysis suggests a potential breakout above the $451 resistance level, with a 65% likelihood of reaching a target price.

data.title: Sparrow to Demonstrate AI-Driven Security and SBOM Management at Black Hat Asia 2026
data.description: A software security company named Sparrow Co., Ltd. has disclosed its involvement in Black Hat Asia 2026, occurring from April 21 to April 24 at the Marina Bay Sands Expo and Convention Centre in Singapore. Specializing in application security testing and safeguarding software supply chains, Sparrow Co., Ltd. will be participating in the event.
Wintrust Financial sees Jefferies increase its target price to $185 from $170.

data.title: First Mold Announces Moderate Price Adjustment Amid Global Chemical Raw Material Surge
data.description: In Zhongshan, China on April 21, 2026, the shutdown of the Strait of Hormuz followed by a subsequent decrease in ship traffic carrying oil has had a profound impact on various industries, particularly plastic injection molding. This disruption has affected approximately 5% of the world's oil, which is crucial for producing plastics.

data.title: UNI price set to drop to $2.70 in 72 hours, as DeFi sell-off intensifies with support lost at $3.26, eyeing $3.00 break.
data.description: The technical structure of UNI is deteriorating as it crashes to $3.26, indicating significant weakness. The crucial support level is faltering, signaling a potential further decline towards $2.70. The next significant drop is anticipated once the psychological barrier at $3.00 is breached.
